title: Started learning programming
description: Picked up Python during a summer break out of curiosity about how apps actually worked, and never really stopped.

title: Built first app
description: Shipped a small Android to-do app to the Play Store — rough around the edges, but the first time code I wrote ran on someone else's phone.

title: First open-source contributions
description: Started contributing fixes and small features to libraries I used daily, which taught me more about production code than any course did.

title: AWS Certification
description: Earned AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate after a few months of hands-on lab work.

title: Created AI VPN
description: Built a self-optimizing VPN routing engine as a deep dive into applying lightweight ML to a real infrastructure problem.
